title: Better debug stick
description: Change the texture of a debug stick without changing the texture of a regular stick.
body:
### Better debug stick

Change the texture of the debug stick to a new one without changing the texture of the regular stick. The new version also has animation.
![New debug stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a55a2d29dce78fa696e6c9b57601de6e6997b96d_0.webp)
